name: System
description: Master boot controller for the ROOT_SYSTEM

scripts.boot:mac: npm run clean:ports && npm run preboot && concurrently -c "green,blue,yellow" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,DOCS" "cd System-Backend && python main.py" "cd System-Frontend && npx expo start -c -p 8081" "mkdocs serve --dev-addr 0.0.0.0:8001"
scripts.boot:win: npm run preboot && concurrently -c "green,blue,yellow" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,DOCS" "cd System-Backend && venv\Scripts\activate && python main.py" "cd System-Frontend && npx expo start -c -p 8081" "mkdocs serve --dev-addr 0.0.0.0:8001"
scripts.boot:simple: npm run preboot && concurrently -c "green,blue,yellow" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,DOCS" "cd System-Backend && python main.py" "cd System-Frontend && npx expo start" "mkdocs serve --dev-addr 0.0.0.0:8001"
